New ship, new ways to experience Alaska at sea


It’s Seattle to spectacular — on our brand-new, kid-free Alaska voyages. Our
newest ship, Brilliant Lady, was made for Alaska’s main-character moments. From
the reimagined Athletic Club designed for optimal scenic viewing, to every deck
that dares to show off, you’ll never miss a moment worth bragging about —
towering glaciers, mirror-still fjords, and golden sunsets that stretch for
miles.

But that’s not all! Our Alaska voyages also feature over 250 Shore Things (with
75+ exclusive to Virgin Voyages!), so you can make the most of each unique port.
Plus, you’ll be sailing with all the new dining, entertainment, and Shore Things
that make Brilliant Lady our most exciting lady ship yet. With redesigned ship
spaces based on what we know our Sailors love, you’ll be cruising in luxury
through rugged landscapes you’ll have to sea to believe.
